name: Select Harvests Limited
analysis: SHV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$3.8300, stop A$3.5130, target A$5.0254 (3.77:1) — then trail it.
